rationale: Acting on Review 2 fixes four scope problems all grounded in the diff — notably the AffineAlgGroup bundling (lines 34–38, directly contradicts the stated 'don't bundle' roadmap guidance) and AlgPoints being k-points-only (line 45) — leaving better-designed Layer-0 foundations. Review 1's layer-architecture argument is sound but its fix leaves those foundational design flaws intact, so the resulting PR would still have scope problems Review 2 caught.
